zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：窄幅整理中的温和偏多结构
zh.content:
当前SOL价格维持在68美元附近窄幅震荡，整体呈现温和上行结构。价格持续站稳20日均线上方67.40，说明短期多头仍占优，但波动率明显收缩，市场进入整理阶段。

MACD指标维持金叉上方运行，柱状动能为正值，短线动能仍偏多，但未出现明显放量突破信号。RSI暂缺数据，需结合后续走势判断超买超卖状态。

支撑位集中在67.80与67.40区域，下方67.40为20日均线关键防守位，一旦跌破可能回测67.00附近。上方阻力在68.10及68.50区域。

短线建议以区间震荡思路为主，可在回踩67.4附近分批布局多单，目标看向68.5上方。若跌破67.4需及时止损，整体以低吸高抛为主。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Price action in SOL/USD is currently in a tight consolidation band just above the 20-day simple moving average, indicating a mildly bullish but indecisive structure. The market has held steady after a small intraday push, with momentum favoring accumulation rather than distribution. Despite limited volatility, maintaining levels above the SMA suggests buyers are still defending trend integrity. Overall structure remains neutral-to-slightly positive, with no clear breakout yet forming direction.

Momentum indicators show early positive bias, with MACD reading above zero suggesting underlying bullish pressure is present. However, the absence of a confirmed signal line value limits precision in crossover interpretation, reducing conviction in trend acceleration. RSI data is unavailable, which restricts overbought or oversold assessment. Still, price stability combined with positive MACD implies controlled momentum rather than speculative spike-driven movement.

Support and resistance levels remain tightly compressed, reflecting ongoing consolidation. Immediate support is found near the 20-day SMA around 67.40, followed by intraday lows near 67.84, which have recently held firm. On the upside, resistance is forming around 68.10, with a potential extension toward 68.50 if momentum strengthens. A decisive break beyond these levels would likely define the next directional move.

Trading conditions currently favor a range-bound strategy with a slight bullish tilt in the short-term environment. Buying interest appears strongest near support zones, while profit-taking is likely to emerge near resistance. Traders may consider scaling entries around the SMA region while placing protective stops just below 67.40 to manage downside risk. A breakout above 68.10 would shift bias toward continuation and momentum-based positioning.
